name: NeuPath Health Inc.
summary: NeuPath Health Inc. provides chronic pain management services in Canada. The company offers chronic pain assessment and multi-modal treatment plan that helps patient to manage chronic pain and optimize quality of life. It also provides workplace health services and independent medical assessments to employers and disability insurers through a national network of health care providers. The company operates 12 clinics under the Centres for Pain Management and InMedic Creative Medicine brands in Ontario. NeuPath Health Inc. is headquartered in Mississauga, Canada.
